# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: PASS

**Test:** Security headers: X-XSS-Protection removed or set to 0
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:46.134Z
**OWASP Category:** API7:2023 - Server Side Request Forgery

## Description

X-XSS-Protection header is absent, which is expected because the header is deprecated in modern browsers.
